insight: The Master Bot (and bots generally) perform poorly on custom base sets, described simply as 'trash at all custom sets' by a player who tested a modified base set removing Blastforge, Steelsplitter, Wall, Tarsier, and Gauss Cannon.
author: hyreon
context: Player testing a custom 'Reso War' alternate base set and noting bot quality degrades on non-standard sets.
